title: setaria utowanaea
side_effects: Setaria utowanaea can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling, particularly in individuals with pre-existing sensitivities. Ingesting large amounts of the plant can also cause gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Excessive use of Setaria utowanaea extracts may lead to liver damage and kidney strain, which can be life-threatening if left untreated. Additionally, improper use of the plant may interact with certain medications, resulting in adverse reactions and reduced efficacy of prescribed treatments.
